prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large purple metal sphere
  - obj_1: large red metal cylinder
  - obj_2: small green metal cube
  - obj_3: large cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_4: small green rubber cube
  - obj_5: large cyan rubber sphere
  - obj_6: small yellow rubber cube
  - obj_7: large blue metal cylinder
  - obj_8: small blue metal cube

Questions:
[qrr_0201] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0202] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0203] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0204] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0205] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0206] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0207] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0208] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0209] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0210] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0211] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0212] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0213] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0214] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0215] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0216] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0217] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0218] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0219] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0220] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
